l1: This discipline is under active development — troubleshooting steps will be added by the Device and Deployment tech lead.

l2: This discipline is under active development — advanced troubleshooting will be added by the Device and Deployment tech lead.

Run 'dsregcmd /leave' then re-enrol to resolve most Intune/Azure AD join issues on Windows 10/11.
